title: Miniapps ecosystem on Arbitrum - BuidlGuidl's Builder Bootcamp
description:
Join Hunter B. to explore the growing ecosystem of Farcaster miniapps on Arbitrum. We'll dive into the latest trends, use cases, and tools available for building on this Layer 2 network.

---------

0:00 Introduction & Setting the Stage
0:00:31 Speaker Introduction (Hunter B. from Offchain Labs)
0:01:07 Arbitrum Today: The Land of Liquidity & DeFi
0:01:47 Arbitrum's Current Ecosystem Experiments
0:02:45 Experiment Deep Dive: Robin Hood on Arbitrum
0:03:26 Why Arbitrum is Betting on Farcaster
0:04:26 Farcaster Value: Creator Economy & Onchain Social
0:05:22 Arbitrum Everywhere: Tokenizing Value (RWAs)
0:06:31 The State of Arbitrum & Farcaster (Mini-App Stats)
0:09:09 What's Next? Dev Rewards & Future Innovation
0:10:27 Driving DeFi Mini-Apps & Long-Term Team Strategy
0:13:17 Q&A and Conclusion
